reviews.review_msg: I took this class online and it was fairly say. The midterm was very straightforward and the weekly activities were easy to do as well.
A troublesome outline and homework without examples

One of the hardest courses I've taken at SFU. The midterm was extremely difficult; the assignments had little guidance or outline on what was expected or how to succeed; their lecture slides had little text, and they spoke very quickly, so writing good notes was very hard; and the material was extremely dense, and confusing.
